generic_instantiations.code:
package Lt_Compatibility_Checks is new
  SPARK.Containers.Parameter_Checks.Op_Compatibility_Checks

     T2                  => Key_Type,

documentation.description: Check that "<" on keys is compatible with "<" on elements
